# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React-based HR management system built with TypeScript, using Supabase as the backend. The application follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Key Architectural Decisions

- **Frontend-First Approach**: Single-page application with client-side routing
- **Component Composition**: Extensive use of reusable UI components from shadcn/ui
- **Supabase Integration**: Real-time database with authentication and file storage
- **Type Safety**: Full TypeScript coverage for better developer experience
- **Responsive Design**: Mobile-first approach with Tailwind CSS

## Core Components and Patterns

### Layout System
- `AppLayout`: Main application wrapper with sidebar navigation
- `AppSidebar`: Collapsible navigation menu with role-based access
- `TopBar`: Header with user menu and notifications
- `NotificationBell`: Real-time notification system

### Authentication Flow
- Supabase Auth integration with custom user management
- `MandatoryPasswordChange`: Forces password reset for temporary accounts
- Role-based access control with `canAccess` and `hasRole` utilities

### Data Management
- Direct Supabase client usage with real-time subscriptions
- Custom hooks for data fetching and state management
- Optimistic updates for better UX

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap and routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page

### Core Components
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Brand logo component with variant support
- `src/components/NavLink.tsx`: Enhanced React Router NavLink with active states
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Employee selection with search and avatars
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`: Complex file upload flow with AI parsing

### Utilities and Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: Common utility functions (cn for class merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based permission system
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending logic
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Time and date formatting for attendance
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave balance calculations

### Hooks
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management
- `src/hooks/use-toast.ts`: Toast notification system
- `src/hooks/useSort.ts`: Table sorting functionality

## Business Logic and Data Flow

### Employee Onboarding
1. User invited via email with temporary password
2. First login triggers `MandatoryPasswordChange` component
3. Profile completion and role assignment

### Attendance Management
1. Excel files uploaded via `AttendanceUploadFlow`
2. AI parsing using Supabase Edge Functions (`parse-attendance-ai`)
3. Data validation and import with conflict resolution
4. Real-time updates to attendance records

### Leave Management
1. Employees submit leave requests
2. Managers approve/reject based on balances
3. Automatic balance updates and notifications
4. Integration with attendance for leave tracking

### Payroll Processing
1. Salary data managed in employee profiles
2. Overtime calculations from attendance records
3. PDF generation for payslips
4. Integration with accounting systems

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `employees`: User profiles with company relationships
- `attendance_records`: Time tracking data
- `leave_requests`: Vacation and leave management
- `payroll_records`: Salary and compensation data
- `company_settings`: Organization-wide configurations

### Relationships
- Employees belong to companies
- Attendance and leave records link to employees
- Projects have many-to-many relationship with employees
- Settings cascade from company to department level

## Security Considerations

- Row Level Security (RLS) enabled on all Supabase tables
- Authentication required for all data access
- Role-based permissions for sensitive operations
- API key management for external integrations

## Performance Optimizations

- Lazy loading of components and routes
- Efficient database queries with proper indexing
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates
- Image optimization and CDN usage
- Bundle splitting for faster initial loads

## Development Workflow

- Vite for fast development and optimized builds
- ESLint and TypeScript for code quality
- Playwright for end-to-end testing
- Supabase CLI for local development
- Git hooks for pre-commit quality checks
